items.name: Pierced Lips with Ring
items.description:
Silver lip piercing with dangling ring – high-quality mouth accessory featuring a realistic double labret-style piercing and subtle shine. Perfect fit on all avatars (R15, R6, Rthro) with zero clipping. Adds instant Y2K, emo, punk, alt, or soft goth edge to any face. Works great with any skin tone and pairs perfectly with braces, grillz, or layered face accessories. One of the cleanest lip ring UGC pieces available right now.

items.name: ARES GEN-3 Exoskeleton [Torso] [Grey]
items.description:
The third-generation Augmented Reflex Enhancement System (ARES) is a state-of-the-art exoskeleton frame developed by the BLKT Corporation, widely regarded as one of their flagship military assets. Standard-issue across BLKT's military forces, the exoskeleton has also surfaced repeatedly beyond official channels, rumored to have been funneled into black markets amid the ongoing corporate war.
